Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Stellar Spear madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Stellar Spear madra can be used to slice skin.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Stellar Spear madra produces white light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Jai Long uses Stellar Spear madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Stellar Spear madra flared to life all over the city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Stellar Spear madra was flaring in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Stellar Spear madra is present in Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Stellar Spear madra is a blend of the sword and light aspects.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Orthos suspected the leftover madra was Stellar Spear madra.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
